authority_boundary: Source registry for validator.microcosm.axiom_support_cover checker-scope ordering; it classifies only the witness surfaces bound to an axiom obligation and does not certify checker completeness, suite breadth, semantic proof, release authority, or anti-axiom rejection.

no_checker_surface_bound.meaning: The obligation binds no witness surface reference that can be inspected by this evaluator.
no_checker_surface_bound.claim_effect: Classifies checker-scope absence only; it cannot support checker breadth or completeness.

non_checker_source_surface_refs_only.meaning: The obligation binds witness surface references, but none are local Python checker/test surfaces.
non_checker_source_surface_refs_only.claim_effect: Classifies source-surface reach only; it cannot claim executable checker coverage.

checker_surface_refs_bound.meaning: The obligation binds one or more local Python checker/test surfaces, but no bound negative-case code is found in those surfaces.
checker_surface_refs_bound.claim_effect: Classifies local checker-surface reach only; negative-case status and rejection mapping remain separate gates.

checker_surface_refs_with_negative_case_.meaning: The obligation binds local Python checker/test surfaces and at least one bound negative-case code appears in those surfaces.
checker_surface_refs_with_negative_case_.claim_effect: Classifies the strongest checker-scope reach currently ordered; it still cannot certify anti-axiom rejection or global checker completeness.

material_inputs: local Python source/test files named by bound witness_surfaces
non_laundering_rules: Checker-scope classification is not checker completeness, suite breadth, semantic proof, release authority, or public-readiness authority.
Finding a negative-case code in a checker surface is not proof that the anti-axiom is rejected for the obligation.
Endpoint or negative-case coverage cannot become propagation proof through this component.
Generated support-cover output and generated doctrine-lattice projections are never evidence for this registry.
A higher checker-scope class cannot raise an axiom above the meet of positive support and anti-axiom rejection mapping.
unknown_policy: If a computed checker-scope value is outside this source registry, the validator emits unknown_checker_scope_not_in_source_order rather than support.
anti_claims: This registry makes checker-scope reach computed; it does not make any checker complete.
This registry does not resolve freshness_state, domain_scope, authority_scope, or projection_scope.
This registry does not verify exact_obligation_rejection or subsumes_obligation mapping.
